Package ecarx.carext.connect.bt

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IBtConstant
    Bluetooth interface constant value definition class
    IBtExtension
    RSD BT（Rear side Display Bluetooth）function is to control the Bluetooth function of the rear screen.
    IBtExtension.IBtExtensionCallback
    The interface definition of the callback to be called when receiving Bluetooth device messages.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BtManager
    RSD Bluetooth function entry.
